segments.text: And even though Cloud's grab is not the best, he makes it work, just by great spacing and awareness of what the opponents are trying to do.
Right now, Limit is almost online, but at 160, I don't know if he's going to need it.

full_text: And even though Cloud's grab is not the best, he makes it work, just by great spacing and awareness of what the opponents are trying to do. Right now, Limit is almost online, but at 160, I don't know if he's going to need it.
